title: Wild Worldbuilding
description: 1.21.8 | A collection of worldgen mods/datapacks that add structures, terrain changes, and other QoL features. These make the game feel like an adventure.
body:
![Wild Worldbuilding Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec0b5adecbbd1a29651138374c492614afb9d9b.png)
**REQUIRES FABRIC - SERVER AND CLIENT SIDE**

The goal of Wild Worldbuilding is to provide an expansive, detailed level of exploration and terrain generation to your world. I have never been a huge fan of the modpacks that dont "fit" with the style of minecraft, but I think this compilation preserves and expands upon that minecraft-y feel to the game.

If you want Minecraft to feel more like a fantasy game, or just have more to explore and find, Wild Worldbuilding does it best!

## Features:
This pack only includes mods that are used in worldgen, and enhances the level of exploration you can do in the game. There are no resource packs, or client-side performance boosting mods, it is purely for world generation.

I have also included the [Arboria](https://modrinth.com/datapack/arboria) data pack, incase you want taller trees! It changes the generation quite a bit and makes it feel less vanilla, but they are stunning. you can enable this at world creation.

A compilation pack including [Immersive Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sours-immersive-vanilla) (client side + resource packs) is coming soon!
